name: audio-analysis-mcp
description: Audio analysis tools for AI-driven sound recreation: import and normalize audio, separate stems (Demucs), analyze spectrum/ADSR/modulation, transcribe notes (Basic Pitch), isolate notes, and compare a target against a synthesized take. Runs locally via `uvx audio-analysis-mcp`; `stem_separate` downloads its Demucs model on first use, and the optional `audio_render` capture tool needs PortAudio.
